rationale: Both reviews correctly identify the core scope violation (Layer-5/6 True-placeholder classes before prerequisites), but Review 2's actionable split prescription — keep the Layer-0 AffineAlgGroup/AlgPoints, discard premature Layer-5/6 stubs — leads to a narrower, shippable PR rather than a vague 'do Layer 0 first'; Review 1's bundling finding cannot be verified from the diff and, if wrong, wastes author effort.
